key_risks: A sudden reversal in AI sentiment or profit-taking in high-flying tech stocks.
Weaker-than-expected ISM data causing a broad market sell-off.
Interest rate volatility impacting high-duration growth equities.

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum and AI infrastructure spending trends support continued outperformance in the near term.
Broad technology exposure benefits from the same AI tailwinds and strong recent momentum.
Captures the strong recent trend in equities, particularly in tech and growth sectors.

portfolio_rationale: The portfolio is heavily tilted toward technology and momentum, capitalizing on the strong recent performance of semiconductors and AI-related themes. The upcoming ISM data releases are unlikely to derail this specific thematic momentum within a one-week window.
rationale_summary: Overweighting technology and momentum to capture ongoing AI-driven strength.
